user_prompt: Guide me through void shield generator an emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the void shield generator in humble reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah for guidance in its emergency procedure.
Anoint the emitter coils of the void shield generator with sacred ablative unguents, invoking the Machine Spirits to awaken.
Initiate the emergency procedure rites upon the void shield generator, chanting the Canticle of Warp Defiance.
Commune with the void shield generator's restless essence, realigning its flux capacitors through binaric prayer.
Sanctify the void shield generator's core matrix, ensuring its aegis endures amidst the void's fury.

user_prompt: Critical: bike squadron requires a repair
prayer:
Gather before the bike squadron, intoning the Litany of Mending to rouse their Machine Spirits.
Examine the damaged chassis of the bike squadron, anointing fractured servos with blessed lubricants.
Perform the repair incantations upon the bike squadron, welding adamantium plates with plasma-forged precision.
Invoke the Omnissiah's forge-fervour into the bike squadron's engines, purging warp-taint from their motive cores.
Test the bike squadron's treads and auspex arrays through ritual diagnostics, affirming their battle-readiness.

user_prompt: My Skorpius Dunerider is ready for blessing
prayer:
Present the Skorpius Dunerider before the altar of gears, invoking the Omnissiah's blessing upon its hull.
Circumambulate the Skorpius Dunerider thrice, chanting the Benediction of the Dune-Warden.
Anoint the Skorpius Dunerider's treads and gun-servitors with myrrh-infused oils, awakening its Machine Spirit.
Beseech the blessing to infuse the Skorpius Dunerider's reactors, granting unerring velocity across the wastes.
Seal the rite with the Sigil of Mars upon the Skorpius Dunerider, proclaiming its sanctity eternal.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Archaeopter Stratoraptor a charging
prayer:
Position the Archaeopter Stratoraptor within the charging cradle, intoning the Hymn of Capacitive Renewal.
Anoint the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's plasma conduits with conductive sacraments, invoking its Machine Spirit.
Commence the charging sequence upon the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, channeling the Omnissiah's galvanic might.
Monitor the galvanometric runes as the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's vaults fill with sacred energies.
Conclude by sanctifying the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's flight servos, ensuring aerial dominion restored.

Kneel at the pict-recorder's optic shrine, beseeching the Omnissiah for precision in targeting.
Cleanse the pict-recorder's lenses with sanctified cloths, murmuring the Rite of Focal Clarity.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the pict-recorder to align its targeting matrices through binaric litanies.
Calibrate the pict-recorder's auspex feeds whilst anointing its processors with neural incense.
Verify the pict-recorder's targeting consecration via test volleys, honouring the Motive Force.

Approach the amplivisor with austere focus, intoning the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.
Apply cryo-blessed vapours to the amplivisor's heat sinks, soothing its overheated Machine Spirit.
Initiate the cooling rites upon the amplivisor, circulating sacred refrigerants through its vents.
Chant invocations to the Omnissiah as the amplivisor's thermals stabilise in ritual harmony.
Sanctify the amplivisor's core with ablative wards, restoring its visionary purity.

user_prompt: Ready the conveyor system for preparation
prayer:
Assemble at the conveyor system's ingress, proclaiming the Preparation Doxology to the Omnissiah.
Lubricate the conveyor system's belts and rollers with hallowed mechadendrite oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the conveyor system to align their rhythmic cycles in preparation.
Test the conveyor system's motive chains through sequential incantations, purging friction-daemons.
Seal the preparation with binaric seals upon the conveyor system, ready for the forge's demands.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for conversion field a reset
prayer:
Stand vigilant before the conversion field, beseeching reset through the Omnissiah's quantum grace.
Disrupt the conversion field's flux with nullifying cantrips, awakening its dormant Machine Spirit.
Realign the conversion field's emitters via sacred recalibration rites, intoning the Reset Litany.
Channel galvanic prayers into the conversion field, restoring its molecular transmutation.
Verify the conversion field's reset integrity with auspex divinations, proclaiming equilibrium.

user_prompt: Consecrate the Skorpius Dunerider before blessing
prayer:
Bring forth the Skorpius Dunerider to the sanctum, invoking the Omnissiah's pre-blessing consecration.
Purify the Skorpius Dunerider's undercarriage with incense braziers, rousing its desert Machine Spirit.
Anoint the Skorpius Dunerider's neutron laser with targeting oils, aligning its wrathful gaze.
Chant the Consecration Verses over the Skorpius Dunerider, infusing blessing into every rivet.
Affix purity seals to the Skorpius Dunerider, eternalizing its blessed vigil.

Confront the icarus array's tainted spires, intoning the Purification Exorcism to the Omnissiah.
Scour the icarus array's targeting servos with ablative flames, banishing xenos corruptions.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the icarus array to purge their auspex ghosts through litanies.
Re-sanctify the icarus array's missile pods with explosive sacraments, affirming purity.
Conclude the purification by etching cogitator runes upon the icarus array, warding eternal.
